name: python3-deprecated
title: python3-deprecated
summary: Python decorator for old classes, functions or methods
description:
Python decorator for old classes, functions or methods
The deprecated module provides the @deprecated decorator to deprecate old
Python classes, functions or methods.
.
This package contains the module for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-deprecated because Python decorator for old classes, functions or methods.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-deprecated as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-deprecated with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-deprecated --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
